text: As I stand in this meticulously constructed space, I feel enclosed by clarity and order, yet there is a sensation of sterility—a deliberate blankness that invokes reflection. Moving into the R+D exhibit, the vibrant wall draws me in with its call to curiosity and development. Here, the energy shifts: the environment is suffused with purpose and experimentation. The juxtaposition between the sterile meeting room and this playful, research-oriented display prompts me to ask: which spaces truly foster new thought? I feel quietly energized, a participant in the tension between control and creative exploration.
